name: bpmn
description: Read, explain, create, and edit BPMN 2.0 process diagrams (.bpmn): plain-language summaries, non-destructive layout that preserves multi-diagram sub-process pages, full coverage (collaborations, swimlanes, sub-processes, data objects), structural validation, deep control-flow + structural linting (deadlocks, unreachable nodes, dead ends, implicit splits, misdirected events, bad boundaries), plus diff and find.
